proposals.title: 11 enabled real-time bridges never fired in the simulator battery
proposals.rationale: These edges are either (a) metadata-only bridges without a transform in bridge-simulator, (b) fired by events not in SAMPLE_PAYLOADS, or (c) legitimately dormant until real traffic arrives. Investigate which category each falls into.

proposals.title: Active tool app-forge has no firing edges — is it isolated?
proposals.rationale: The simulator battery didn't replay any event that lit up an edge involving app-forge. Either the tool is legitimately terminal (e.g. ops-bootstrap emits no inter-tool events), or SAMPLE_PAYLOADS is missing an event that should connect to it.
